title: Metamorphosis
author: Kafka, Franz
summary: Gregor Samsa wakes to find himself transformed into a large insect, lying on his armour-like back, unable to sleep on his right side or use human limbs. He panics, inspects his domed belly and many small legs, and worries about missing his train and angering his employer. His family knocks and calls but he cannot open the locked door; he hears the maid and the chief clerk arrive. He struggles to free himself from the bed, remembers occupational hardships, and fears the consequences of reporting sick, tracing embarrassment, isolation, and alienation finally.

characters.name: Gregor Samsa
characters.personality: dutiful, anxious, introspective; preoccupied with work and family obligations
characters.lifespan: In the excerpt he awakens transformed into a vermin and remains trapped and struggling; fate beyond this scene is not shown in the provided text.

characters.name: his mother
characters.lifespan: In the excerpt she calls to Gregor and retreats satisfied by his reply; no further fate shown in excerpt.

characters.name: his father
characters.lifespan: In the excerpt he knocks and in part returns to his breakfast; further outcome not shown.

characters.name: his sister
characters.personality: concerned, pleading, attentive to household matters
characters.lifespan: In the excerpt she begs Gregor to open the door and whispers to him; later fate not shown.

characters.name: the maid
characters.lifespan: In the excerpt she opens the outer door for the visitor; no further fate shown.

characters.name: the chief clerk
characters.personality: official, disapproving, inquisitive about Gregor’s absence
characters.lifespan: In the excerpt he visits the flat to check on Gregor; later outcome not shown.

characters.name: the office assistant
characters.lifespan: Mentioned as a likely reporter of Gregor's absence; no direct action in excerpt.

characters.name: the boss
characters.personality: authoritative, difficult, hard of hearing (described by Gregor)
characters.lifespan: Referred to as employer whose anger Gregor fears; does not appear in excerpt.

characters.name: the doctor from the medical insurance company
characters.lifespan: Mentioned hypothetically as likely to be brought by the boss; not present in the excerpt.
